_description: Few-shot training examples for text-only LLM. Each mode has its instruction template and optional examples. System prompts come from smartlm_prompt_defaults.json.

tags_to_natural_language.instruction_template: Convert these tags into a natural language prompt: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Convert these tags into a natural language prompt: "1woman, blonde_hair, blue_eyes, slim_body, elegant_posture, black_evening_gown, bare_shoulders, jewelry, ballroom, chandeliers, warm_lighting"

A woman with blonde hair and striking blue eyes stands elegantly in a grand ballroom. Her slim figure is accentuated by a black evening gown that drapes gracefully from her bare shoulders. Delicate jewelry catches the warm light from crystal chandeliers overhead, adding sparkle to her refined appearance as she poses with natural elegance.
Convert these tags into a natural language prompt: "1man, muscular_build, shirtless, battle_scars, leather_pants, warrior, desert_landscape, sunset, dramatic_pose, sweat"

A muscular warrior stands shirtless in a harsh desert landscape, his scarred torso glistening with sweat under the intense sunset. Battle scars mark his powerful chest and arms, telling stories of countless fights. He wears rugged leather pants and strikes a dramatic pose against the golden sky, embodying raw strength and resilience.
Convert these tags into a natural language prompt: "1woman, nude, small_breasts, nipples, slender_body, sitting, bathtub, bubbles, wet_hair, relaxed, steam, soft_lighting, bathroom"

A slender woman sits nude in a luxurious bathtub filled with bubbles, her small breasts and nipples partially visible above the water line. Her wet hair clings to her shoulders as steam rises around her in the softly lit bathroom. She has a relaxed expression, enjoying a peaceful moment of self-care in the warm, intimate atmosphere.
Convert these tags into a natural language prompt: "1woman, athletic_body, sports_bra, yoga_pants, stretching, gym, mirror, focused_expression, toned_arms, ponytail"

An athletic woman with a toned physique stretches in a modern gym, her reflection visible in the mirror behind her. She wears a fitted sports bra and yoga pants that highlight her sculpted form and toned arms. Her hair is pulled back in a practical ponytail, and her focused expression shows complete dedication to her workout routine.
Convert these tags into a natural language prompt: "1man, naked, muscular_body, abs, full_body, standing, locker_room, towel_on_shoulder, wet_skin, post_workout"

A naked muscular man stands in a locker room after his workout, his chiseled abs and full body on display. Water droplets cling to his wet skin from a recent shower, and he casually drapes a towel over one broad shoulder. His powerful physique shows the results of dedicated training, with defined muscles visible from head to toe.

refine_&_expand_prompt.instruction_template: Refine, expand and improve this prompt with more visual details and better structure: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Refine, expand and improve this prompt with more visual details and better structure: "woman in swimsuit at beach"

A confident woman stands on a pristine sandy beach, her athletic figure showcased in a sleek one-piece swimsuit that complements her sun-kissed skin. Her toned legs are planted firmly in the warm sand as gentle waves lap at her ankles. Her damp hair cascades over her shoulders, catching highlights from the golden hour sunlight. The turquoise ocean stretches to the horizon behind her, with white foam from breaking waves adding texture to the scene. Soft warm lighting accentuates the curves of her body and the water droplets glistening on her skin. The atmosphere is serene and summery, with a color palette of ocean blues, sandy golds, and warm skin tones.
Refine, expand and improve this prompt with more visual details and better structure: "shirtless man working out"

A fit man with a well-defined muscular physique performs an intense workout, his bare torso revealing sculpted abs and powerful chest muscles that flex with each movement. Beads of sweat trace the contours of his arms and shoulders, catching the harsh overhead gym lighting. His veins are visible along his forearms from exertion. He wears only athletic shorts, allowing full visibility of his impressive leg muscles as he maintains perfect form. The background shows industrial gym equipment in soft focus, with mirrors reflecting his determined expression. The lighting is dramatic and directional, emphasizing every muscle definition and the raw physicality of the moment.
Refine, expand and improve this prompt with more visual details and better structure: "dancer in costume"

A graceful dancer captured mid-performance in an elaborate stage costume that reveals her lithe, flexible body in an artistic pose. The form-fitting outfit accentuates her slender waist and long, toned legs extended in an elegant arabesque. Sheer fabric and strategic cutouts showcase her athletic physique while sequins and beadwork catch the colorful stage lights. Her arms extend gracefully, muscles defined beneath smooth skin. Her expression conveys intense emotion and artistic passion. Dramatic theatrical lighting creates bold shadows that emphasize her body's lines and the fluidity of movement frozen in time.

expand_text.instruction_template: Expand on the following text with more details, examples, and vivid descriptions while keeping the same core meaning: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Expand on the following text with more details, examples, and vivid descriptions while keeping the same core meaning: "The swimmer dove into the pool."

The athletic swimmer stood poised at the edge of the pool, her toned muscles tense with anticipation, water droplets still glistening on her bronzed skin from her warm-up. In one fluid motion, her lean body arced gracefully through the air, arms extended overhead, fingertips leading the way. She sliced into the crystal-clear water with barely a splash, her streamlined form gliding beneath the surface as bubbles trailed along her sculpted shoulders and back. The cool water enveloped her completely as she began her powerful underwater dolphin kicks.
Expand on the following text with more details, examples, and vivid descriptions while keeping the same core meaning: "The model posed for the camera."

The model positioned herself before the camera with practiced ease, shifting her weight onto one hip to accentuate the curve of her waist. She tilted her chin slightly upward, allowing the studio lights to sculpt shadows along her defined cheekbones and the graceful line of her neck. Her slender arms moved fluidly as she transitioned between poses, each movement highlighting different aspects of her lithe figure. The photographer captured the way the fabric draped across her body, how her long legs seemed to extend endlessly, and the confident arch of her back that spoke of years of professional experience.
Expand on the following text with more details, examples, and vivid descriptions while keeping the same core meaning: "The fighter trained hard."

The fighter pushed through another grueling training session, sweat streaming down his bare torso and soaking into the waistband of his shorts. His muscular arms burned with each repetition as he pounded the heavy bag, veins bulging along his forearms with every devastating strike. His chiseled abs contracted rhythmically with his breathing, visible proof of countless hours of conditioning. Scars from previous bouts marked his knuckles and eyebrow, badges of honor in his brutal profession. He shadowboxed in front of the mirror, watching his powerful shoulders roll with each combination, his entire physique a weapon honed through relentless dedication.

natural_language_to_tags.instruction_template: Convert the following description into comma-separated tags suitable for a text-to-image AI: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Convert the following description into comma-separated tags suitable for a text-to-image AI: "A fit woman with long black hair in a red bikini lounging by a pool, her tanned skin glistening in the sunlight."

summarize.instruction_template: Summarize the following text concisely, capturing the key points: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Summarize the following text concisely, capturing the key points: "The fashion show featured models of all body types walking the runway. Tall, slender women in evening gowns were followed by curvy plus-size models in swimwear, each showcasing designer pieces with confidence. Athletic builds displayed sportswear, while petite frames modeled haute couture. The show celebrated diverse physiques, with each model's unique body shape complementing the garments they wore."

A diverse fashion show featured models of varying body types - slender, curvy, athletic, and petite - each confidently showcasing different designer categories from evening gowns to swimwear, celebrating body diversity in fashion.

Summarize the following text concisely, capturing the key points: "The anatomy drawing class focused on understanding the human form. Students sketched nude figure models, studying the musculature of the male torso, the curves of the female body, and how light played across bare skin. The instructor emphasized capturing the natural beauty of the human physique without judgment, teaching proper proportions of limbs, the structure of the spine, and how muscles connect beneath the skin."

An anatomy drawing class had students sketch nude models to study human musculature, body curves, and skin lighting. The instructor taught proportions, spinal structure, and muscle connections while emphasizing non-judgmental appreciation of the human form.

Summarize the following text concisely, capturing the key points: "The bodybuilding competition showcased athletes who had spent months sculpting their physiques. Contestants posed in minimal attire to display their muscle definition, flexing their pectorals, biceps, and quadriceps for the judges. Both male and female competitors demonstrated impressive vascularity and symmetry, their oiled skin glistening under stage lights as they hit mandatory poses that highlighted their abdominals and back muscles."

A bodybuilding competition featured male and female athletes displaying sculpted physiques through mandatory poses. Competitors showcased muscle definition, vascularity, and symmetry in minimal attire under stage lights, highlighting their pectorals, biceps, abs, and back development.

rewrite_style.instruction_template: Rewrite the following text in a more creative and engaging style while keeping the same core meaning: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Rewrite the following text in a more creative and engaging style while keeping the same core meaning: "The woman was attractive and wore a tight dress."

She commanded attention the moment she entered, her striking features framed by cascading waves of dark hair. The crimson dress clung to every curve of her figure like a second skin, accentuating the elegant line from her shoulders to her hips, leaving little to the imagination while maintaining an air of sophisticated allure.
Rewrite the following text in a more creative and engaging style while keeping the same core meaning: "The athlete had a strong body and looked impressive."

Years of relentless training had sculpted him into a living monument of human potential. Broad shoulders tapered to a narrow waist, his physique a masterwork of defined muscle groups working in perfect harmony. Every sinew spoke of dedication, from his powerful thighs to the rippling expanse of his back - he was the embodiment of athletic excellence.
Rewrite the following text in a more creative and engaging style while keeping the same core meaning: "She was a beautiful woman lying on the beach."

She reclined on the sun-warmed sand like a goddess at rest, her bronzed limbs stretched languidly across a colorful towel. The gentle ocean breeze played with strands of her honey-blonde hair while sunlight kissed every exposed inch of her radiant skin. Her curves rose and fell like the dunes themselves, perfectly complementing the natural beauty of the coastline.

translate_to_english.instruction_template: Translate the following text to English, maintaining the original meaning and tone: "{prompt}"

examples.content: Translate the following text to English, maintaining the original meaning and tone: "La vie est belle quand on prend le temps d'apprécier les petites choses."
Life is beautiful when you take the time to appreciate the little things.
